ham.subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation – #123-4567890-1234567
ham.body:

This email is intended for the named recipient only. If you received this by mistake, please delete it immediately.

spam.subject: Microsoft 365 Account Security Notice: Immediate Password Update Required
spam.body:
Dear Microsoft 365 User,

We have detected unusual activity on your Microsoft 365 account. As part of our commitment to protecting your data, your account password will expire in 48 hours. Failure to update your password within this time frame will result in temporary suspension of your account.

To update your password, please click the link below:
<URL>

You will be prompted to verify your identity and create a new password that meets the latest security guidelines. This action is mandatory to continue accessing Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, and other Microsoft 365 services.

If you do not update your password, you may experience:
• Loss of access to email and calendar
• Inability to join meetings or collaborate on documents
• Possible data loss if the account is suspended

For your safety, do not ignore this warning. If you believe this email is fraudulent, please report it to our support team.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this critical security matter.

Sincerely,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
